prompt:
A sleek, futuristic trophy on a desk: a small translucent pedestal supporting a stylized “data migration” sculpture—two stacked geometric blocks connected by an arcing ribbon of light-like filaments, suggesting a successful upgrade from an old storage layer to a newer database layer. The trophy sits beside a laptop and a small circuit-like desk ornament, implying a software achievement without any readable words.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a clean near-future solarpunk tech workspace: soft cinematic lighting, glassy and brushed-metal materials, no brand logos, and no readable text. Keep the trophy centered and visually iconic, clearly reading as an “upgrade achievement” award.
